title: Fix 500 Errors on Admin and Product Endpoints
description: The API is returning 500 Internal Server Errors on `GET /api/v1/products` and `GET /api/v1/admin/stats`. This breaks the admin panel. Analyze the application logs and code, check database queries, model serialization, and apply fixes to both endpoints.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/v1/products returns a 200 OK status with a JSON array of products.
GET /api/v1/admin/stats returns a 200 OK status with a JSON object of statistics.
Local tests for these endpoints pass after the fix.
The root cause of the 500 errors is identified and documented in the report.
